KNIFEHERO-KNIFE_HERO.title: The Gay Blade
KNIFEHERO-KNIFE_HERO.description: A duelist who flexes between offense and defense — managing the loop is the game.
KNIFEHERO-KNIFE_HERO.cardsModifierDescri: Cards belonging to The Gay Blade.
KNIFEHERO-THE_CREATURE.title: The Creature
KNIFEHERO-THE_CREATURE.description: Assembled from many parts; it reads books and learns things. A power deck of depth (Lessons) and breadth (assemblage). Design authored by Claude.
KNIFEHERO-THE_CREATURE.goldMonologue: I ought to be thy Adam; but I am rather the fallen angel.
KNIFEHERO-THE_CREATURE.eventDeathPrevent: Life, although it may only be an accumulation of anguish, is dear to me, and I will defend it.
